research_question: What is the performance of fault prediction models in software engineering, and which predictors and techniques perform best?

population.name: Population (Software Context)
include: software systems, modules, files, or classes

intervention.name: Intervention (Prediction Technique)
include: machine learning-based fault prediction models (Naive Bayes, random forest, neural networks, etc.)
software metrics-based approaches (CK metrics, McCabe, Halstead)
process metrics, change metrics, social network metrics
exclude: manual code review or inspection without prediction model
testing techniques not involving predictive models

outcome.name: Outcome (Performance Metric)
include: probability of detection (PD), probability of false alarm (PF)
exclude: subjective quality assessments without quantitative metrics

study_design_include: empirical studies (experiments, case studies, controlled experiments)
study_design_exclude: secondary studies (existing systematic reviews, mapping studies)
